achievements.title: Amateur Gardener - SEE FORUM TOPIC
achievements.description: Pick your first flower out in the wild. - USE SAVE FILE IN FORUM IF YOU WANT TO COMPLETE FLOWER AND BUG MEMOS
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Getting my Feet Wet
achievements.description: Reel in your first fish. Many more where that came from!
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Captured a Critter
achievements.description: Catch your first bug. What a fine specimen!
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Shellfish Collector
achievements.description: Pick up your first shellfish in the depths of the sea.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: This World is Scarier than I Thought!
achievements.description: Stumble upon a monster and come out victorious.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Ready to Take to the Seas
achievements.description: Fulfill the errand requested of you to obtain the Canoe.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Not Just Any Old Watch
achievements.description: Fulfill your errand and receive a powerful watch in return.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Stewed Grasshoppers...Yum
achievements.description: Help the old lady find some green grasshoppers and get a tasty meal in return.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Foxy Tofu
achievements.description: Bring the yellow fox a pink flower and watch the transmogrification ensue.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: I Guess Ogres Like Tofu?
achievements.description: Bring the Ogre a delicous meal of fried tofu and uncover the disguise.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Every Rose Has Its Thorns
achievements.description: Give the kid a rose so he can build up the courage to talk to his love.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: I Grant You One Wish
achievements.description: Give the mysterious girl by the pond a Carp and have your wildest wish granted.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: I Think You Dropped This...
achievements.description: Return the worker his ax to gain access to new heights.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Fair Trade
achievements.description: Offer the kid at the summit a fresh Bluegill in exchange for his prized Hyacinth.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Here Son, Now Will You Love Me?
achievements.description: Help the old man impress his son by sneaking him a fresh Catfish.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Extending My Reach
achievements.description: Fulfill your part-time job by giving the man on the island 3 Breams.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Hurry...The Sake is Hot!
achievements.description: Catch an Opaleye and give it to the fisherman at the Beach for a shiny new rod
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Oysters Give Me Strength
achievements.description: Trade the hidden man some oysters at the beach in return for vitality.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Pachi, Pachi, Pachi
achievements.description: Give the girl at the beach a fish small enough for her tastes and get a smack in return.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Bribery is Efficiency
achievements.description: Pay the boy to stop him from torturing the turtle. I don't think he learned his lesson...
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: A Little More Horsepower
achievements.description: Help your dad save face with mom by finding a shiny pearl for her necklace.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Is This Really a Trade?
achievements.description: I traded a cloud-seed slug with the princess for...a cloud-seed slug?
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Honest Dishonesty
achievements.description: Lie to the goddess to help the lazy worker get his pick back.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: The Missing Ingredient
achievements.description: Help the lady at the Moor track down the missing ingredient and get a nice new rod in return.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Fancy a Pansy?
achievements.description: Give the boy a really fancy fish and get a fancy flower back.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Cucumber Conundrum
achievements.description: If the door wants cucumber, I give the door cucumber
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Some Natural Light
achievements.description: Help Kappa bring some light into his home.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: A Lure Fit For a King
achievements.description: Give Kappa a frog lure so he can make you an enhanced version.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: I've Proved My Worth
achievements.description: Prove to Zeus that you are worthy of angling the River King.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: The River King
achievements.description: Catch the Legendary River King.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Sca--rab
achievements.description: Bring your dad a dung beetle. Why do kids always have to change things?
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: A Suitable Wedding Gift
achievements.description: Bring the man near the Ocean a Red Seabream. I'm sure his sister will love it...
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Yellowtail Teriyaki
achievements.description: Bring the man at the Ocean a delicious Yellowtail, so he can make his wife a teriyaki dinner.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Got Momo!
achievements.description: Save the little girl at the Ocean from the claws of the Sea Eagle.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Noisy Enough For You?
achievements.description: Help the sea captain wage war on the mermaids.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: They're a Bit Tight
achievements.description: Give the mermaid two Scallop shells in return for some valuable information.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: A Spearfish Fit For a King
achievements.description: Beat the old hermit in a fishing contest to win a rod worthy of the Sea King.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: The Sea King
achievements.description: Catch the Mystical Sea King.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: The King of Kings
achievements.description: Catch the King of Kings and become a master fisherman.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Time to Dive
achievements.description: Purchase the Flippers to vastly improve your swimming abilities.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: More Room For Fishies
achievements.description: Upgrade your cooler to medium capacity.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Ultra-Wide Cooler
achievements.description: Upgrade your cooler to maximum capacity.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: That's a Lot of Buzzing
achievements.description: Upgrade your bug box to maximum capacity.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Time to Open a Flower Shop!
achievements.description: Upgrade your flower basket to maximum capacity.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: The Seven Herbs
achievements.description: Return the seven herbs home to gain some strength.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Natural Beauty
achievements.description: Fill every spot in your mother's garden with beautful flowers.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Time for a Payday!
achievements.description: Completely fill the largest cooler with fish.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Swimming in Cash
achievements.description: Max out your cash stack. Time to go on a shopping spree!
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Fishing Enthusiast
achievements.description: Own every single fishing rod.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: I Can Catch Anything
achievements.description: Own every single hook, float, lure, bait, and fly available for purchase, all at the same time.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Not So Weak Anymore
achievements.description: Reach level 10.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: My Strength is Building
achievements.description: Reach level 20.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Bring on the Monsters
achievements.description: Reach level 30.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: My Power is Beyond Measure
achievements.description: Reach level 40.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Monsters Cower at the Sound of My Footsteps
achievements.description: Reach level 50.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Master of the Lake
achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Lake.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Master of the Stream
achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Stream.

achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Beach.

achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Shore.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Moor.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Master of the Ocean
achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Ocean.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Master of the Remote Island
achievements.description: Collect all of the flora and fauna available at the Remote Island.

achievements.title: Bug Memo Complete
achievements.description: Completely fill the bug memo.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Flower Memo Complete
achievements.description: Completely fill the flower memo.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Shellfish Memo Complete
achievements.description: Completely fill the shellfish memo.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: Legend of the Memo King
achievements.description: Complete all four memos and solidify your place in River King history.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.title: BIG Lake Fisherman
achievements.description: Catch all of the BIG fish at the Lake.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.description: Catch all of the BIG fish at the Stream.
achievements.author: tsyque

achievements.description: Catch all of the BIG fish at the Summit.

achievements.description: Catch all of the BIG fish at the Moor.

achievements.description: Catch all of the BIG fish at the Ocean.

achievements.title: I Have Ascended...I Am Now the King of Kings
achievements.description: Catch every BIG fish available in the game. (Excludes the 3 Kings).
